script: BURL=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-url --query value -o tsv); BTOK=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-token --query value -o tsv); echo url=$BURL; for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do echo "=== try $i ==="; curl -s -m 10 -o /tmp/br-$$ -w 'http=%{http_code}\n' -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $BTOK" "$BURL/edge/list_tabs"; head -c 150 /tmp/br-$$; echo; rm -f /tmp/br-$$; sleep 2; done
